TRACK RECORD

Programs I've Governed

Four representative engagements, from enterprise crisis recovery to margin turnaround, showing how I translate governance discipline into measurable outcomes.

★ Signature Proof Point
NCR VOYIX, GLOBAL PMO MANAGER, 2020–2024
Leading Enterprise Recovery After a Cyber-Attack
70,000Sites Affected
16Applications
98%Service Restored

When a 2023 cyber-attack disrupted service across 70,000 sites and 16 applications, I led the recovery portfolio, coordinating Sales, Engineering, Product, and Professional Services through a high-visibility enterprise response.

→ How

I stood up enterprise-wide escalation and communication protocols so decisions could move fast without losing executive visibility, and ran the centralized reporting that gave C-suite leaders a single, real-time view of recovery status across every workstream.

The response achieved 98% service restoration and earned a Letter of Commendation from the President of NCR.

Recognized in writing

NCR's SVP of Global Retail, EVP of Professional Services, and the President of NCR Commerce co-signed a letter recognizing the customer communication, task prioritization, and real-time Smartsheet reporting I put in place during the response.

View Letter (PDF)
TOSHIBA GLOBAL COMMERCE SOLUTIONS, DELIVERY & PROGRAM MANAGER, 2024–2026
Turning Around Delivery and Margin Health
$5–10MContract Values
+30%On-Time Delivery
−20%Margin Erosion

Directing enterprise client portfolios spanning implementation and sustainment programs, I aligned scope, timeline, budget, and quality expectations across complex, multi-workstream delivery.

→ How

I built an integrated Smartsheet and Jira reporting structure that gave leaders weekly budget updates, milestone status, and emerging risk visibility in one place, replacing scattered status decks with a single source of truth that made forecasting and margin conversations faster and more precise.

The result: on-time delivery improved 30% and program margin erosion dropped 20%.

NCR VOYIX, GLOBAL PMO MANAGER, 2020–2024
Three Years of Rising Customer Satisfaction
91→98%CSAT, 2021–2023
3 yrsRunning CSAT Champion

Serving as Professional Services Customer Satisfaction Champion for three consecutive years, I was accountable for the trend, not just a single score.

→ How

I governed a global PMO framework that tightened portfolio consistency, prioritization discipline, and execution standards across enterprise client programs, the kind of steady governance that compounds into trust over multiple years, not just a single good quarter.

Scores rose from 91% in 2021 to 95% in 2022 and 98% in 2023.

NCR, PROGRAM/PROJECT MANAGER, 2016–2020
Multi-Brand Rollout Across 1,000+ Sites
5Brands
1,000+Corporate & Franchisee Sites
+30%Bid Estimation Accuracy

I managed implementation and technology-refresh programs across five brands and more than 1,000 sites, directing execution from discovery and planning through deployment and transition support.

→ How

Where clients were at risk, I restored governance and rebuilt milestone tracking to earn back stakeholder confidence, and separately optimized the bid review and estimation process itself, improving accuracy 30% and strengthening forecasting confidence for every program that followed.

WORK SAMPLES

Applied Work

Two artifacts that show how I structure governance and technical delivery in practice.

★ Signature Proof Point

AI-Powered Last-Mile Exception Automation

Final project for the UT Austin Postgraduate Program in AI Agents for Business Applications (in progress, expected July 2026). I designed a modular, four-workflow multi-agent system that ingests noisy delivery logs, applies deterministic escalation rules, resolves exceptions with policy-grounded agents, and validates every output with a critic layer before it reaches a customer.

Selected slides below trace the arc from business problem through architecture to validated results.

100% task completion 100% escalation accuracy 100% resolution accuracy 5.0/5 mean coherence

Program Governance Dashboard (Smartsheet)
